_locale: placeholder — strings not yet translated; en.json serves as fallback

crisis.title: It sounds like you may be in crisis. Please reach out for help immediately.

disclaimer.eligibility: Results shown are from verified records. Eligibility is determined by each service provider — ORAN does not guarantee qualification. Always confirm with the provider.

service.eligibility_hint: You may qualify for this service. Confirm eligibility with the provider.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
